title: astragalus glomeratus
intro: Astragalus glomeratus, also known as the globular milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Astragalus glomeratus include immune system support, reduced stress and fatigue, and improved cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried roots, capsules, and teas, often used to aid in the prevention and treatment of various health conditions.
